answer: GitHub will prevent merging a pull request if there are any conflicts between the changes in the pull request and the existing code on main. The two ways to resolve this issue are to make a commit that resolves the conflicts or use comments in the pull request to discuss the conflicts with your team members.
The default branch name is main and the branch name created in the tutorial is readme-edits. The readme-edits branch was created to make and test changes without affecting the main branch.
README file, license file, .gitignore file; the tutorial explicitly instructs the user to include the README file.
